form.formComment: Racing well recently. Most recently favourite; won by 3 len at this track March 27 over 1400m defeating Nobu Eight carrying 57kg at $2.10. The start before that raced on speed throughout when 2nd of 11 at this track on March 12 over 1500m, head behind Eifer Jet with 57kg at $7.10. Found his best form now. Take beating.
